title: Random Item Manhunt
description: Random Item Manhunt, chase your friends or be chased while trying to obtain an Item under a specific amount of time!..
body:
**Item Race** is a multiplayer speedrun mod where a random item is selected at the start — runners must find it before the timer runs out, while hunters track them down with a compass!

**Commands:**
`/runner <player>` — Set the runner

`/hunter <player>` — Set a hunter

`/racetime <seconds>` — Set timer

`/startrace` — Begin the race

`/stoprace` — Stop the race
